programme.title: Great Australian Walks
programme.desc: Julia Zemiro explores some of the greatest places in Australia during a series of one-day walks and shares a treasure trove of untold stories.

programme.title: Muster Dogs: Where Are They
programme.desc: Presented by Lisa Millar, Muster Dogs: Where Are They Now spans two seasons, revisiting the human and canine stars from Muster Dogs, checking in on the dogs progress since their final milestone challenges.

programme.title: Dr. Karls How Things Work
programme.desc: Dr Karl lifts the lid on how some of Australias best loved products are made, stepping behind factory lines to uncover the intricate workings of some of our most productive manufacturing plants.

programme.title: ABC Late News
programme.desc: ABC News, also known as ABC News and Current Affairs, is a public news service produced by the Australian Broadcasting Corporation (ABC). It broadcasts within Australia and the rest of the world, covering both local and world affairs

programme.title: The Business
programme.desc: Australias leading daily business and finance show, bringing you up to date on market moves, economic trends and the forces affecting consumers, investors, employees and business owners big and small. Presented by Kirsten Aiken (Mon2023Wed) and Alicia Barry (Thu).

7.30 is an Australian nightly television current affairs program that airs on ABC and ABC News at 7:30 pm from Monday to Thursday. The program is currently hosted by Sarah Ferguson and is considered the flagship for the network. The program covers a range of topics including politics, world events, business, entertainment, health, and lifestyle.

programme.title: The World
programme.desc: Know whats going on in our world with the latest international news and a complete look at todays global issues and events. The World brings you reports from ABC News correspondents and interviews with experts, commentators and guests. Presented by Beverley OConnor (Mon2023Thu) and Yvonne Yong (Fri).

programme.title: Great Australian Walks
programme.desc: Julia Zemiro explores some of the greatest places in Australia during a series of one-day walks and shares a treasure trove of untold stories.

programme.title: Australian Story
programme.desc: Putting the real back into reality TV, the award-winning series with no narrator and no agendas, just authentic stories told in peoples own words. For 26 years we have been telling the stories of extraordinary Australians.

programme.title: Gardening Australia
programme.desc: Inspiring, entertaining and full of practical advice, join Costa Georgiadis and the team as they unearth gardening ideas, meet avid gardeners and look at some of the most inspiring gardens from across the country.

programme.title: Dr. Karls How Things Work
programme.desc: Dr Karl lifts the lid on how some of Australias best loved products are made, stepping behind factory lines to uncover the intricate workings of some of our most productive manufacturing plants.

programme.title: The World

The World brings you reports from ABC News correspondents and interviews with experts, commentators and guests. Presented by Beverley OConnor (Mon2023Thu) and Yvonne Yong (Fri).

programme.title: News Breakfast
programme.desc: Spend Christmas with your favourite breakfast television family. Michael Rowland, Lisa Millar, Tony Armstrong and Nate Byrne are joined by some of the regular contributors and favourite guests for some festive season cheer.

programme.title: News Breakfast
programme.desc: Spend Christmas with your favourite breakfast television family. Michael Rowland, Lisa Millar, Tony Armstrong and Nate Byrne are joined by some of the regular contributors and favourite guests for some festive season cheer.

programme.title: ABC News Mornings (L)
programme.desc: The show delivers up‑to‑the‑minute news from Australia and around the world, covering politics, economics, culture, sports, and other major events.

programme.title: ABC News At Noon
programme.desc: ABC News, also known as ABC News and Current Affairs, is a public news service produced by the Australian Broadcasting Corporation (ABC). It broadcasts within Australia and the rest of the world, covering both local and world affairs

programme.title: Landline
programme.desc: A tasty sample of stories from the land - covering food, agriculture, crops, climate, business and innovation. We meet fascinating people who make our rural and regional communities unique. Presented by Pip Courtney. (Return)

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: Holding power to account for over 60 Years, Four Corners continues to expose scandals, trigger inquiries, lead national debate and confront the issues that matter to us all. Australias premier investigative journalism program.

programme.title: Media Watch
programme.desc: Australias leading forum for media analysis and comment, bringing you a brave and fearless critique of the weeks journalism, issues and events in the news. Presented by Paul Barry.

programme.title: Dr. Karls How Things Work
programme.desc: Dr Karl lifts the lid on how some of Australias best loved products are made, stepping behind factory lines to uncover the intricate workings of some of our most productive manufacturing plants.

programme.title: Grand Designs Transformations
programme.desc: On the Mornington Peninsula, an overgrown sloping bush block is transformed into a family retreat designed to embrace its natural surrounds, while a heritage-listed mid-century classic home in Sydney gets a modern upgrade.

programme.title: Larapinta
programme.desc: Talia is introduced to the long and powerful history of Larapinta. Palaeontologist, Dr Adam Yates describes the area in prehistoric times when the megafauna walked the land, while Benji Kenny tells his dreaming story.

programme.title: Australia: Unofficial History
programme.desc: Jacki Weaver explores 1970s Australia through rediscovered government films, featuring commentary and filmmaker interviews that reveal how social changes shaped modern Australia.

programme.title: ABC News With Joe OBrien
programme.desc: ABC News, also known as ABC News and Current Affairs, is a public news service produced by the Australian Broadcasting Corporation (ABC). It broadcasts within Australia and the rest of the world, covering both local and world affairs

programme.title: A Bite To Eat With Alice
programme.desc: A Bite to Eat with Alice is a cooking show dedicated to creating delicious food. No matter your skill level, host Alice and her guest - who may not be able to cook toast - will inspire you to experiment in the kitchen.

programme.title: That Pacific Sports Show
programme.desc: Join Tiana Penitani and Sam Wykes for your weekly hit of Pacific joy, as they share inspiring stories and incredible sporting prowess of athletes with Pacific Island heritage, from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: ABC National News
programme.desc: ABC News, also known as ABC News and Current Affairs, is a public news service produced by the Australian Broadcasting Corporation (ABC). It broadcasts within Australia and the rest of the world, covering both local and world affairs

programme.title: Find Me A Match
programme.desc: We go behind the scenes of Australias traditional Hindu, Muslim and Jewish Matchmakers, as they put together singles for the purpose of marriage.

programme.title: Ambulance Australia
programme.desc: Viewers witness fast-paced action, critical decision-making, and the challenges faced by medical personnel in saving lives. The program delivers tension, emotion, and the dedication of real-life heroes on the front lines.

programme.title: Foreign Correspondent
programme.desc: We are your passport to the world. Our stories, told through the ABCs network of foreign correspondents, will take you to incredible places where youll meet the people and see the forces shaping our world.

programme.title: Planet America
programme.desc: The race to the 2024 Presidential Election is on. A handful of Republican candidates remain chasing frontrunner Donald Trump, while Joe Biden is running for re2023election. Chas and John guide you through every step of the way.

programme.title: National Press Club Address
programme.desc: The National Press Club hosts public debates and discussions that shape Australia now and into the future. Home to national conversations with decision2023makers and influencers; driving the national debate forward.

programme.title: Gadis Bionik
programme.desc: The crime rate in Indonesia has risen dramatically, gang violence has taken over. The police have their hands full tracking down the criminals. It seems like a success story when the Kontet gang - one of the most sought-after organizations - is imprisoned as a result of their criminal actions like blackmailing. However, they manage to escape from prison and return to action in the underworld.

programme.title: Permainan Bulan Desember
programme.desc: Permainan Bulan Desember

programme.title: Rumah Kentang
programme.desc: Farah returned from Melbourne to Jakarta after her mother passed away and had to take care of her younger sister, Rika, while also dealing with the familys financial crisis. Unable to pay their rent, they moved into an old house known to be haunted, nicknamed the potato house.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles 3
programme.desc: The turtles are on a new adventure as they travel back in time to Japan, to perfect the art of being samurais. They also come to the aid of a village that tries to end its days of suppression.

programme.title: Coppa Italia
programme.desc: Coppa Italia is the annual domestic cup of Italian football. The knockout competition was organized by the DDS and the Lega Calcio until the 2009–10 season and by Lega Serie A ever since.

programme.title: Double Dhamaal
programme.desc: After losing a huge sum to a police officer, four slackers find themselves unemployed and broke. They make elaborate plans to avenge their humiliation as well as ensure that he winds up alone and penniless.

programme.title: Kasautii
programme.desc: A re-imagination of Anurag and Prernas soul-stirring romance. Made for each other, will these star-crossed lovers unite against the odds of betrayal, revenge and retribution?

programme.title: Janji Inspektur Virat
programme.desc: Inspector Virat must fulfill his promise of honor to protect and marry Sai, the daughter of his deceased senior, which triggers an inner conflict and a complicated love triangle between Virat, Sai, and Pakhi.

programme.title: Dil
programme.desc: This film tells the story of a romance that blossoms between two young people from different backgrounds.

programme.title: Jhanak
programme.desc: Setelah kematian ibunya, Jhanak terpaksa menikahi tunangan sepupunya Arshi, Aniruddh, untuk melarikan diri dari penguntitnya, Tejas. Meskipun Aniruddh dan Arshi telah bersama selama tujuh tahun, Jhanak memasuki kehidupan mereka dalam keadaan yang menyedihkan dan mulai bekerja sebagai pembantu di rumah tangga Bose. Sementara beberapa anggota keluarga memperlakukannya dengan baik, yang lain terus-menerus menghina dan meremehkannya.

programme.title: Teri Meri Doriyaann
programme.desc: The fate of the three Brar cousins Angad, Garry and Veer are linked with the three Monga sisters Sahiba, Seerat and Keerat. Sahiba is the hardworking and independent second daughter of the Monga family. She is an artist and earns money for her family by selling her art. Seerat, the eldest Monga sister, is pampered by her mother, Santosh, for her beauty. Santosh dreams of getting Seerat married to a rich man. As fate would have it, Angad falls in love with Seerat. However, Seerat is manipulated by Garry and his fake love. On Seerat and Angads wedding day, Seerat runs away with Garry.

programme.title: Vasudha
programme.desc: A happy go-lucky Vasudha joins business leader Chandrikas house as a maid and craves her approval despite their ideological differences. Will she find acceptance in Chandrikas world?

programme.title: Tutur Tinular: Pedang Naga...
programme.desc: Set at the end of the Singasari Kingdom and the rise of Kediri Kingdom; there are two siblings, Arya Dwipangga, who loves literature, and Arya Kamandanu, who loves martial arts. Dwipangga steals Kamandanu’s girlfriend and runs away but gets trapped in the cave of weapon master, Empu Ranubaya, who makes him a student.

programme.title: Napsu Gila
programme.desc: Piah (Suzana) applies for a job as a nursing home caregiver at the remote Wisma Cikolot. The residents of this nursing home include Nurnaningsih, a former film star whose movies never made it big, and a former ship captain (Tan Tjeng Bok) who has a habit of peeping on women. Since Piah’s arrival, there have been frequent mysterious murders among the residents.

programme.title: Tarot
programme.desc: When a group of friends recklessly violates the sacred rule of Tarot readings, they unknowingly unleash an unspeakable evil trapped within the cursed cards. One by one, they come face to face with fate and end up in a race against death.

programme.title: Story Of Ricky
programme.desc: Riki-Oh, a young man who has superhuman strength, is incarcerated in a private prison, where inmates are treated like slaves. He is forced to use his unstoppable form of martial arts to destroy the corrupt officials and their lackeys.

programme.title: Coppa Italia
programme.desc: Coppa Italia is the annual domestic cup of Italian football. The knockout competition was organized by the DDS and the Lega Calcio until the 2009–10 season and by Lega Serie A ever since.

programme.title: Luka Chuppi
programme.desc: Pretending to be married in order to cohabitate, a small-town couple lands in endless awkward situations to hide the truth from their orthodox families.

programme.title: Kasautii
programme.desc: A re-imagination of Anurag and Prernas soul-stirring romance. Made for each other, will these star-crossed lovers unite against the odds of betrayal, revenge and retribution?

programme.title: Janji Inspektur Virat
programme.desc: Inspector Virat must fulfill his promise of honor to protect and marry Sai, the daughter of his deceased senior, which triggers an inner conflict and a complicated love triangle between Virat, Sai, and Pakhi.

programme.title: Dil Ka Rishta
programme.desc: A man finds himself in a dilemma when he accidentally kills his girlfriends fiance and keeps it a secret from her, not realizing that it could tear their lives apart.

programme.title: Jhanak
programme.desc: Setelah kematian ibunya, Jhanak terpaksa menikahi tunangan sepupunya Arshi, Aniruddh, untuk melarikan diri dari penguntitnya, Tejas. Meskipun Aniruddh dan Arshi telah bersama selama tujuh tahun, Jhanak memasuki kehidupan mereka dalam keadaan yang menyedihkan dan mulai bekerja sebagai pembantu di rumah tangga Bose. Sementara beberapa anggota keluarga memperlakukannya dengan baik, yang lain terus-menerus menghina dan meremehkannya.

programme.title: Teri Meri Doriyaann
programme.desc: The fate of the three Brar cousins Angad, Garry and Veer are linked with the three Monga sisters Sahiba, Seerat and Keerat. Sahiba is the hardworking and independent second daughter of the Monga family. She is an artist and earns money for her family by selling her art. Seerat, the eldest Monga sister, is pampered by her mother, Santosh, for her beauty. Santosh dreams of getting Seerat married to a rich man. As fate would have it, Angad falls in love with Seerat. However, Seerat is manipulated by Garry and his fake love. On Seerat and Angads wedding day, Seerat runs away with Garry.

programme.title: Valley Of Dreams
programme.desc: Located in northwest New Mexico and known for its unique badland landscape is the Ah Shi Sle Pah Wilderness. The otherworldly rock formations and petrified wood make it a great destination for those who want to get away. We spent 5 hours wandering around the area, seeing virtually nobody and could have easily stayed longer and still not seen it all. If youre looking for an unusual and unforgettable adventure, this place is for you.

programme.title: Five Children And It
programme.desc: Five children staying in their eccentric uncles labyrinthine mansion for protection during World War I befriend a sand fairy who has the power to grant wishes.

programme.title: Atomic Kids
programme.desc: A uranium prospector is eating a peanut butter sandwich in the desert where atom bomb tests are being done. He becomes radioactive, and helps the FBI break up an enemy spy ring.

programme.title: First Dog
programme.desc: A foster boy is befriended by a lost dog who turns out to belong to the President of the United States. The boy decides to run away from the foster home to return the canine to the White House.

programme.desc: Minna, a young girl, misuses her newfound ability to create and control other peoples dreams to teach her bothersome stepsister a lesson.

programme.title: Valley Of Dreams
programme.desc: Located in northwest New Mexico and known for its unique badland landscape is the Ah Shi Sle Pah Wilderness. The otherworldly rock formations and petrified wood make it a great destination for those who want to get away. We spent 5 hours wandering around the area, seeing virtually nobody and could have easily stayed longer and still not seen it all. If youre looking for an unusual and unforgettable adventure, this place is for you.

programme.title: The Christmas Project Reunion
programme.desc: An awkward high school boy is forced to break out of his shell, when his elementary school nemesis moves back into town and tries to steal his girlfriend.

programme.desc: A uranium prospector is eating a peanut butter sandwich in the desert where atom bomb tests are being done. He becomes radioactive, and helps the FBI break up an enemy spy ring.

programme.title: Yakka Dee S4, Ep 3

programme.title: Messy Goes To Okido S3, Ep 13
programme.desc: Everyone in Okido is feeling tired; Messy tries to help by adding extra super beans to Farmer Fuddles new recipe, but now everyone has far too much energy!

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S1, Ep 3
programme.desc: How hard can it be to pick one plant at the top of a mountain with Mojos Chopper Top? Pretty hard when theres a hungry goat who wants that plant even more than they do.

programme.title: Return Of Reincarnated...
programme.desc: Wudang is in trouble again, with both Dugu Wu Di planning to attack the Wudang temple and an interloping group of martial artists from Japan waiting in the background.

programme.title: The Blue And The Black, Pt 2
programme.desc: The Blue And The Black, Pt 2

programme.title: Life Gamble
programme.desc: LIFE GAMBLE is the tale of a simple blacksmith (Kuo Chue) with extraordinary martial-arts skills who is entangled in a life-and-death struggle among swordsmen, thieves, con artists, a smooth dagger-slinger (Fu Sheng), a beautiful seductress (Lin Chen-chi) who can kill with her smile, a servant with a deadly whip, an assassin with a golden hairpin, an iron-fisted villain on a murderous rampage, a ruthless gambler with seemingly unlimited funds, and so many more.

programme.title: Forbidden Tales Of Two Cities
programme.desc: Amorous complications and modern morals are just the beginning in Macau, where a love quartet is the source for sexy merriment.

programme.title: The Crimson Charm
programme.desc: The tale of a noble swordsman and a one-armed swordswoman who find themselves up against the evil Crimson Charm gang of thieves and thugs.

programme.title: My Name Aint Suzie
programme.desc: Young Mei Li works as a bar girl in Wanchai to make a living. When she meets Jimmy in the bar, she thinks he is her true love and falls crazily in love with him. When Jimmy has to leave, Mei Li is devastated.

programme.title: Heaven And Hell
programme.desc: A man and woman are kicked out of the Court of Heaven on trumped up charges of bringing shame onto the Kingdom.

programme.title: Magnificent Wanderers
programme.desc: Millionaire Chu Te-Sa (Chiang) invests his considerable wealth into the rebel movement who are intent on usurping the ruling Mongol powers. His goals are impeded by a lack of support though and the supposed allies he has made in the town are merely eager to get their hands on his money. During an attack where these craven comrades flee, Chu befriends three con-artists who relish the chance to show off their fighting skills. The trio subsequently agree to help Chu in his quest to end Mongol rule and hatch a plan to destroy a major munitions dump.

programme.title: The Adv. Of Emperor Chien Lung
programme.desc: Liu Yung plays a Ching Dynasty detective, who seeks out court corruption with the help of a streetwise youth. Together they teach these corrupt fat cats a well-deserved lesson.

programme.title: The New Shaolin Boxers
programme.desc: International favorite Alexander Fu Sheng cemented his stardom in this, the fourth film in his esteemed directors Shaolin series. Fu gives both a great dramatic and kung-fu performance as an honorable carriage driver who finds love and death when he battles particularly homicidal street punks.

programme.title: The Cave Of Silken Web
programme.desc: The 3rd part of Shaw Bros Journey To The West sees sex and spectacle combine as our heroes are trapped by the seductive 7 Spiders, hellbent on achieving immortality by eating monks!

programme.title: The Delightful Forest
programme.desc: Wu Sung, a military swordmaster, is acused of murdering his adulterous sister-in-law and a thug, and sent to exile in Meng Chou. At the prison camp, Shih En, son of the camp commander, intercedes in his favour, to spare him the humiliating 100 bamboo lashes.

programme.title: Enchanting Shadow
programme.desc: A young scholar spends the night in a creepy temple that is said to be haunted. He doesnt believe in the rumors, but after running into a Taoist swordsman, he meets a beautiful lady ghost.

programme.title: The Champion
programme.desc: A recently jailed martial arts master teams up with a wronged woman to take down the mans brother, a coal baron who rules a small town with an iron fist.

programme.title: Hong Kong 73
programme.desc: Back in 1973 the stock market was skyrocketing, but HKs social issues continued to worsen. TVB and Shaw Bros biggest stars come together for this ingenious tongue-in-cheek tale.

programme.title: Shaolin Temple
programme.desc: The Shaolin Temple is the last place to resist defeat by the Manchu Dynasty, mostly because of their unique fighting style. Men from far and wide come to wait outside the temple, hoping that they will be admitted as pupils. As the Abbot becomes older, he realizes that the Manchus are determined to destroy the temple and eradicate the Shaolin fighting techniques. To this end, he decides that it is time at last to admit worthy men into the temple as students, to learn the way of Shaolin.

programme.title: The Mermaid
programme.desc: Zhang and Jins daughter, Peony, are betrothed at birth but Jin objects to the engagement now. Zhang meets a carp spirit that looks exactly like Peony and they fall in love.

programme.title: The Black Falcon
programme.desc: Zhang is a Bond-like international spy who must find the headquarters of a villainous crime organization by seducing their boss daughter, Julie Tan.

programme.title: The Comedy Of Mismatches
programme.desc: Two pairs of lovers got mismatched accidentally. The man disguises as a woman for his sisters wedding ceremony, while his lover disguises as a man to marry another woman.

programme.title: Killers On Wheels
programme.desc: Two guys and their women constantly get harassed by a group of young motorcycle outlaws on a small island. The situation becomes deadly when one of them gets killed.

programme.title: The Sentimental Swordsman
programme.desc: The Sentimental Swordsman

programme.title: The Trail Of The Broken Blade
programme.desc: A young aristocratic knight Li Yueh renounces his sword, identity and the woman he loves after going on the lam for assassinating a corrupt official responsible for his fathers demise.

programme.title: Crazy Shaolin Disciples
programme.desc: Three young kung-fu warriors from wildly different backgrounds: Royal Guard Lo Lieh, fleeing soldier Lo Meng, and villager Wang Yu become students of Shaolin at the same temple.

programme.title: Clans Of Intrigue
programme.desc: One day, when the heroic outlaw Chu Liu Xiang is dining with his friend Monk Wu Hua, Gong from the Holy Water Palace accuses Chu of stealing the holy water and using it for various murders.

programme.title: Passing Flickers
programme.desc: An amusing insiders look at the Hong Kong film industry from Li Han Hsiang, recreating some of the eras funniest and most surreal stories ripped straight from the gossip.

programme.title: Mercenaries From Hong Kong
programme.desc: A gang of ex-military guys are hired by a mysterious dame who wants them to go into Cambodia and kidnap the assassin who killed her father.

programme.title: Puppy Love
programme.desc: This is a story of adolescent playfulness and innocence lost. Two best friends grow up together, but rivalry intervenes when they discover boys!

programme.title: The Brave Archer 3
programme.desc: The third installment of The Brave Archer series brings Guo Jing and Huang Rong closer together as they struggle to find a cure for the Iron Palm Clans deadly blows.

programme.title: Mr. Vampire 2
programme.desc: Grave robbers unearth preserved vampires. Transporting child vampire, its spell breaks, befriending locals. Parent vampires awaken, escape. Herbalist pursues to destroy them.

programme.title: Maybe Its Love
programme.desc: 10 year-old Marbles witness the murder of a young woman.

programme.title: Faithfully Yours
programme.desc: Best friends Bodil and Isabel, apparently happily married, sneak off for secret affairs using each other as an alibi. But when Isabel is killed when they were supposed to have been together. Bodil gets caught up in her own web of lies.

programme.title: Destinys Champion
programme.desc: Brilliant director Sun Chung and the majestic Ti Lung reunite for a thriller about an aging fighter who relives his violent past mistakes through a streetwise kid.

programme.title: Get In The Dark
programme.desc: Miss Qiao had died in vain and her butler paid a paper craftsman to make a paper doll. Miss Qiaos spirit is revived to take revenge and a series of horrible events begins to happen.

programme.title: The Flying Mr. B
programme.desc: The Flying Mr. B

programme.title: Zombie Island
programme.desc: Jeff goes to a deserted and mysterious island with his friends hoping to seek out exciting adventures but turns out to be a horrifying journey as they get trapped and are attacked by the zombies!

programme.title: Gangster, The Cop, The Devil
programme.desc: Detective Lin sets up a special unit to arrest the motorbike robber and the crime syndicate behind the thefts in Foshan. His pregnant wife is hit by a motorbike robber, leading him to uncover their revenge plan.

programme.title: Painted Face
programme.desc: An action-thriller centered on a vampire-like woman who eats the skins and hearts of her lovers.

programme.title: The Mad Monk
programme.desc: Stephen Chow plays an arrogant god in Heaven who is being punished for his pranks and mistakes. He is sent to Earth and reincarnate as Mad Monk to change the destiny of three misguided souls - a prostitute, a beggar and a villain. The Mad Monk needs to complete the task in three days in order to return to Heaven.

programme.title: The Last Tycoon
programme.desc: Action superstar Chow Yun-Fat portrays real-life gangster Chen Daqi as he rises to the upper echelons of power, finding himself torn between the love of two women, the murderous plots of the secret service, and the looming threat of war.

programme.title: Mother Vs Mother
programme.desc: Guan De Xing fell in love with Li Xiao Yun when he was young, but was opposed by his mother and had to marry Zhou Shen Yu. Since then, Li holds a grudge against Zhou.

programme.title: The Fate Of Reunion
programme.desc: Thousands of years ago, Green Snake gained enlightenment under the guidance of Dao Qing and gradually falls for him. However, her devotion to Dao Qing caused him to reincarnate and go through the pains of death.

programme.title: Women
programme.desc: Liang Pao-erh joins the carefree Spinsters’ Club when she discovers her husband is having an affair. Despite the seemingly happy front that her sisters put on, beneath it all, each of them secretly yearns for a man in her life.

programme.title: The Mighty Peking Man
programme.desc: A greedy Hong Kong businessman hires a young hunter to capture a giant gorilla said to live deep in the Indian jungle. The hunter finds the ape, and living with it he finds a feral human female who has befriended the creature.

programme.title: Hong Kong Playboys
programme.desc: Sheng is a rich playboy who lives a carefree and fun life with the ladies, until his mother decides that he should get married. Up against other lady killers in his quest to find Miss Right, Sheng must decide what he wants.

programme.title: Final Justice
programme.desc: A cop relies on a young car thief to take down four gangsters, who plan to rob a rich merchant for a large amount of money.

programme.title: Casino Tycoon 2
programme.desc: Inspired by the story of Macau’s Casino King Stanley Ho, the movie traces his blood-splattered fight to the top from 1930s to 1960s. In 1941, a young graduate, Benny Ho, flees Hong Kong during the Japanese invasion and heads for Macau. Benny starts as a labourer but rises to the top of the city’s casino business with his courage, wisdom and diligence.

programme.title: Lost Memories
programme.desc: A failed assassination attempt in Harbin, China in 1909 changes the course of history. Now two JBI agents must find the connections between it and an ancient Korean artifact.

programme.title: How To Choose A Royal Bride
programme.desc: The young emperor Kangxi is attempting to select a bride. His mother has arranged for young available women to visit him so that he may choose.

programme.title: King Of Beggars
programme.desc: A rich familys son falls in love with a woman who will only marry him once he becomes a Kung-Fu Master. In this Dramedy He becomes a legendary hero, by attempting to save the emperor, during his true quest of love.

programme.title: Hidden Heroine
programme.desc: A drug cartel is entrenched in the Dong Zhou area. Mei Jing of the Thunderbolt Womens Commando Unit, leads her team to attack the drug base, but they are being ambushed and the identity of Meis father is exposed.

programme.title: Jealousy
programme.desc: As a man leaves his wife and daughter, a series of brief conversations, observed gestures, chance encounters and impulsive acts, tell the story of the relationships that flounder and thrive in the wake of this decision.

programme.title: Casino Tycoon
programme.desc: Inspired by the story of Macau’s Casino King Stanley Ho, the movie traces his blood-splattered fight to the top from 1930s to 1960s. In 1941, a young graduate, Benny Ho, flees Hong Kong during the Japanese invasion and heads for Macau. Benny starts as a labourer but rises to the top of the city’s casino business with his courage, wisdom and diligence.

programme.title: Unmatchable Match
programme.desc: Ruthless gangster Guts pulls off a heist of diamonds, then enlists the aid of longtime triad member, Fei, to arrange a buyer for them. But when Guts double crosses the buyer, Fei ends up with the diamonds, wanted by both the cops and Guts.

programme.title: Unbeatable
programme.desc: Fai, once a world champion in boxing, escapes to Macau from the loan sharks and unexpectedly encounters Qi, a young chap who is determined to win a boxing match.

programme.title: Royal Tramp
programme.desc: A jester is accidentally recruited by a cult leader to spy on a young and inexperienced Chinese emperor. Things dont go according to plan, and he ends up working for multiple opposing sides while trying to survive the madness.

programme.title: Ip Man
programme.desc: During the Japanese invasion of China, a wealthy martial artist is forced to leave his home when his city is occupied. With little means of providing for themselves, Ip Man and the remaining members of the city must find a way to survive.

programme.title: Love Punch
programme.desc: The film revolves around a woman in her late twenties who rediscovers her talent for boxing after a long hiatus. She unexpectedly meets her former boxing coach and the pair work together to help her reach the final rounds of professional boxing matches.

programme.title: To Summit Of Earth Again, Ep 3
programme.desc: documentary is a record of the second Chinese scientific expedition to Mount Qomolangma, which took place in the summer of 2022. It involved around 200 scientists, led by Yao Tandong from the Institute of Tibetan Plateau Research under the Chinese Academy of Sciences.

programme.title: Wetland, Our Land, Ep 2
programme.desc: A strand devoted to the nature and wildlife of China, the people who lived alongside them, and the great and diverse landscapes with which they all contend.

programme.title: Catching A Wave, Ep 1
programme.desc: The film presents real stories of how China’s philosophy of “shelving disputes and seeking common development” is put into practice through initiatives and partnerships with neighboring coastal states.

programme.title: Sustainable In China
programme.desc: China has set forward climate goals of reaching peak carbon dioxide emissions before 2030 and achieving carbon neutrality before 2060.

programme.desc: The show, a combination of documentary and variety show, is aiming at exploring new ways to bring high-end cultural relics closer to the public

programme.title: DW News
programme.desc: DW offers regularly updated articles on its news website and runs its own center for international media development, DW Akademie. The broadcasters stated goals are to produce reliable news coverage, provide access to the German language, and promote understanding between peoples.

programme.title: DW News Focus
programme.desc: DW News Focus

programme.title: Close Up: Of Rhinos And Men
programme.desc: A win for wildlife, a loss for humans. African nature reserves are restricting indigenous peoples‘ access to rivers and forests - and, in doing so, are endangering their very existence.

programme.title: Shift: Can AI Help Save The...
programme.desc: Scientists are using AI in many environmental projects to help analyze data and accelerate processes. But at the same time, complex AI systems require significant resources. AI and sustainability: Is it a good fit?

programme.title: DW News
programme.desc: DW offers regularly updated articles on its news website and runs its own center for international media development, DW Akademie. The broadcasters stated goals are to produce reliable news coverage, provide access to the German language, and promote understanding between peoples.

programme.title: DW News Focus
programme.desc: DW News Focus

programme.title: Planet A
programme.desc: A nuclear fuel rod is used for 3-6 years. After that, it’s taken out of the reactor and then continues to stay radioactive for hundreds of thousands of years. Talk about inefficiency. But French nuclear fuel company ORANO is one of the very few companies recycling nuclear fuel on a commercial scale – and has led this field for decades.

programme.title: Eco India: Green, Fair And Clean
programme.desc: Retrofitting conventional vehicles could help Delhi go electric more equitably. Also: women farmers battle age-old structures — and making power from bird poop.

programme.title: Planet A
programme.desc: A nuclear fuel rod is used for 3-6 years. After that, it’s taken out of the reactor and then continues to stay radioactive for hundreds of thousands of years. Talk about inefficiency. But French nuclear fuel company ORANO is one of the very few companies recycling nuclear fuel on a commercial scale – and has led this field for decades.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo S23, Ep 1
programme.desc: FS Grand Sumo Season 23 – Episode 1 opens the tournament with powerful rikishi entering the dohyo to begin their campaign for the championship title. Veteran wrestlers rely on experience and technique while rising stars aim to prove their strength and stability. Each bout highlights explosive clashes, balance battles, and tactical pushes as competitors attempt to dominate the ring.

programme.title: Mega Fights In 60 S1, Ep 1
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features The Ring Magazines 2011 Fight of The Year from the Foxwoods Resort in Mashantucket, Connecticut, USA. Undefeated welterweight world champion Andre Berto (27-0, 21 KOs) puts his title on the line against Vicious Victor Ortiz (28-2, 22 KOs) in a fight that restores your passion in the sport of boxing. Berto was seeking his 6th straight world title defense while Ortiz was getting his first ever crack at a world title.

programme.title: Mega Fights In 60 S1, Ep 10
programme.desc: A compressed 60-minute showcase featuring top-tier boxing moments, powerful punches, and decisive victories from global fight cards.

programme.title: Judo For The World S1, Ep 9
programme.desc: Judo For The World S1, Ep 9

programme.title: Knockouts!: Alvarez Vs Rhodes
programme.desc: The main event in this episode sees Saul (Canelo) Alvarez making his first defense of the WBC light middleweight title, taking on challenger Ryan Rhodes. The bout ends in the final round after a series of unanswered blows. Also on the card, action from former light heavyweight champ Adonis Stevenson.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo S23, Ep 2
programme.desc: FS Grand Sumo Season 23 – Episode 2 continues the fierce competition as rikishi strive to improve their standings in the tournament rankings. Powerhouses rely on their mass and pushing techniques, while agile fighters attempt swift throws and ring control. The episode emphasizes strategy, endurance, and momentum as the race toward the Emperor’s Cup intensifies.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts S4, Ep 1
programme.desc: BWF Martial Arts S4, Ep 1

programme.title: MMA 30 S1, Ep 2
programme.desc: This episode follows former UFC welterweight champion Matt Serra around his hometown in New Jersey for a look at the lighter side of this intense competitor. Ring girl Natasha Wicks shows us that the fighters arent the only ones with the big guns. Plus a behind the scenes look at the UFC Fan Expo and an interview with MMA legend Chael Sonnen.

programme.title: FS MMA: Bodog Fight Highlights
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! This episode features all the highlights from BodogFIGHT season three showing recaps and highlights of all the MMA scraps that took place in Costa Rica.

Powerhouses rely on their mass and pushing techniques, while agile fighters attempt swift throws and ring control. The episode emphasizes strategy, endurance, and momentum as the race toward the Emperor’s Cup intensifies.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts S4, Ep 1
programme.desc: BWF Martial Arts S4, Ep 1

programme.title: MMA 30 S1, Ep 2
programme.desc: This episode follows former UFC welterweight champion Matt Serra around his hometown in New Jersey for a look at the lighter side of this intense competitor. Ring girl Natasha Wicks shows us that the fighters arent the only ones with the big guns. Plus a behind the scenes look at the UFC Fan Expo and an interview with MMA legend Chael Sonnen.

programme.title: FS MMA: Bodog Fight Highlights
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! This episode features all the highlights from BodogFIGHT season three showing recaps and highlights of all the MMA scraps that took place in Costa Rica.

programme.title: Fox And Friends
programme.desc: A morning news show that includes interviews, features and banter among the hosts.

programme.title: Americas Newsroom
programme.desc: Bill Hemmer and Dana Perino cover current events happening around the nation and the world; guests pertinent to the news topics are interviewed and viewer emails are also answered by the anchors and guests.

programme.title: Americas Newsroom
programme.desc: Bill Hemmer and Dana Perino cover current events happening around the nation and the world; guests pertinent to the news topics are interviewed and viewer emails are also answered by the anchors and guests.

programme.title: The Faulkner Focus
programme.desc: Harris Faulkner anchors this new weekday series which provides insight and perspective into the latest political stories.

programme.title: Outnumbered
programme.desc: A news show featuring the top headlines of the day, from pop culture to politics, with a panel of four women vs. one man.

programme.title: America Reports
programme.desc: Took over the 1pm-3pm ET time slots from Outnumbered Overtime with Harris Faulkner (2017) and The Daily Briefing with Dana Perino (2017), with Faulkner beginning her new show The Faulkner Focus (2021) at 11am ET and Perino becoming co-anchor of Americas Newsroom (2007) from 9am-11am ET.

programme.title: America Reports
programme.desc: Took over the 1pm-3pm ET time slots from Outnumbered Overtime with Harris Faulkner (2017) and The Daily Briefing with Dana Perino (2017), with Faulkner beginning her new show The Faulkner Focus (2021) at 11am ET and Perino becoming co-anchor of Americas Newsroom (2007) from 9am-11am ET.

programme.title: The Story
programme.desc: Martha MacCallum brings you the Story of our times, with her tough but fair interviews and straightforward analysis. The Story captures the voices you want to hear from in these consequential times, and the people at the center of every breaking and history-shaping moment.

programme.title: The Will Cain Show
programme.desc: Join Will Cain as he tackles the latest headlines from his unique perspective along with thought-provoking long-form interviews with leading figures.

programme.title: The Five
programme.desc: A talk show news program featuring a rotating panel of mostly conservative contributors discussing current political and pop culture issues.

programme.title: Special Report With Bret Baier
programme.desc: A look at the days top news headlines and panel discussion hosted by Bret Baier.

programme.title: The Ingraham Angle
programme.desc: Longtime Fox News contributor Laura Ingraham anchors the 10 PM slot with this new weekday series.

programme.title: Jesse Watters Primetime
programme.desc: Jesse Watters speaks with newsmakers from across the country to give Americans a show where straight talk is the only talk.

programme.title: Hannity
programme.desc: Sean Hannity is a multimedia superstar, spending four hours a day every day reaching out to millions of Americans on radio, television and the Internet.

programme.title: Gutfeld!
programme.desc: Late night show with author, comedian and television host and producer Greg Gutfeld, offering up satirical political and social commentary with a weekly panel of guests.

programme.title: Sausage Party (Galaxy Premium)
programme.desc: A sausage leads a group of supermarket products on a journey to discover the truth about their existence and what really happens when they are picked off the shelf.

programme.title: Buddy Games (Galaxy Premium)
programme.desc: A group of friends reunite to play The Buddy Games, a wild assortment of absurd physical and mental challenges. In the process, theyll heal old wounds, right past wrongs and figure out the true meaning of friendship...or die trying.

programme.title: Sex Tape (Galaxy Premium)
programme.desc: A married couple wake up to discover that the sex tape they made the evening before has gone missing, leading to a frantic search for its whereabouts.

programme.title: The Legend Of Zorro
programme.desc: Despite trying to keep his swashbuckling to a minimum, a threat to Californias pending statehood causes the adventure-loving Don Alejandro de la Vega and his wife, Elena, to take action.

programme.title: The Lovely Bones
programme.desc: Centers on a young girl who has been murdered and watches over her family - and her killer - from purgatory. She must weigh her desire for vengeance against her desire for her family to heal.

programme.title: The Fog
programme.desc: A thick mist full of vengeful spirits haunts a prosperous island town off the coast of Oregon, as its inhabitants try to learn their towns dark secret in order to stop it.

programme.title: Ghost Rider
programme.desc: When motorcycle rider Johnny Blaze sells his soul to the Devil to save his fathers life, he is transformed into the Ghost Rider, the Devils own bounty hunter, and is sent to hunt down sinners.

programme.title: The Tuxedo
programme.desc: A chauffeur discovers that his employer’s high-tech tuxedo grants superhuman abilities. He must now stop a villainous plot while mastering the suit’s powers.

programme.title: 28 Days Later
programme.desc: Four weeks after a mysterious, incurable virus spreads throughout the United Kingdom, a handful of survivors try to find sanctuary.

programme.title: Chappie
programme.desc: Chappie tells the story of a robot imbued with artificial intelligence who is stolen by two local gangsters who want to use him for their own nefarious purposes.

programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: A man who believes he has put his mysterious past behind him cannot stand idly by when he meets a young girl under the control of ultra-violent Russian gangsters.

programme.title: Life
programme.desc: A team of scientists aboard the International Space Station discover a rapidly evolving life form that caused extinction on Mars and now threatens all life on Earth.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt, an elite IMF agent, is framed for a mole within his team. He must race against time to clear his name and prevent a global catastrophe.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible 3
programme.desc: IMF agent Ethan Hunt comes into conflict with a dangerous and sadistic arms dealer who threatens his life and his fiancee in response.

programme.title: Ode To Joy (Galaxy Premium)
programme.desc: Charlie has a neurological disorder in which strong emotions, especially joy, make him faint. Working as librarian gives him a quiet environment, but then Francesca enters the library and his life.

programme.title: The Grudge (Galaxy Premium)
programme.desc: A house is cursed by a vengeful ghost that dooms those who enter it with a violent death.

programme.title: Bad Santa (Galaxy Premium)
programme.desc: A miserable conman and his partner pose as Santa and his Little Helper to rob department stores on Christmas Eve. But they run into problems when the conman befriends a troubled kid.

programme.title: Friday The 13th
programme.desc: A group of young adults visit a boarded up campsite named Crystal Lake where they soon encounter the mysterious Jason Voorhees and his deadly intentions.

programme.title: Monster Hunter
programme.desc: When Cpt. Artemis and her loyal soldiers are transported to a new world, they engage in a desperate battle for survival against enormous enemies with incredible powers. Feature film based on the video game by Capcom.

programme.title: Sausage Party
programme.desc: A sausage leads a group of supermarket products on a journey to discover the truth about their existence and what really happens when they are picked off the shelf.

programme.title: Bad Santa 2
programme.desc: Fueled by cheap whiskey, greed and hatred, Willie teams up once again with his angry little sidekick, Marcus, to knock off a Chicago charity on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Buddy Games
programme.desc: A group of friends reunite to play The Buddy Games, a wild assortment of absurd physical and mental challenges. In the process, theyll heal old wounds, right past wrongs and figure out the true meaning of friendship or die trying.

programme.title: Sex Tape
programme.desc: A married couple wake up to discover that the sex tape they made the evening before has gone missing, leading to a frantic search for its whereabouts.

programme.title: The Legend Of Zorro
programme.desc: Despite trying to keep his swashbuckling to a minimum, a threat to Californias pending statehood causes the adventure-loving Don Alejandro de la Vega and his wife, Elena, to take action.

programme.title: 13 Hours: Secret Soldiers Of...
programme.desc: During an attack on a U.S. compound in Libya, a security team struggles to make sense out of the chaos.

programme.title: Pineapple Express
programme.desc: A process server and his marijuana dealer wind up on the run from hitmen and a corrupt police officer after he witnesses his dealers boss murder a competitor while trying to serve papers on him.

programme.title: Daddys Home
programme.desc: Brad Whitaker is a radio host trying to get his stepchildren to love him and call him Dad. But his plans turn upside down when their biological father, Dusty Mayron, returns.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
programme.desc: A young Peter Parker/Spider-Man begins to navigate his newfound identity as the web-slinging superhero.

programme.title: Time Is Up
programme.desc: Vivien, a student who postpones happiness for the future, meets Roy, a troubled young man. But when an accident occurs and changes their lives, their focus shifts to being happy in the present.

programme.title: Room 203
programme.desc: Two best friends and roommates are terrified by the vengeful spirits dwelling in their apartment. Based on the novel published by Kobunsha and written by Nanami Kamon.

programme.title: After Ever Happy
programme.desc: As a shocking truth about a couples families emerges, the two lovers discover they are not so different from each other.

programme.title: The Company You Keep
programme.desc: After a journalist discovers his identity, a former Weather Underground activist goes on the run.

programme.title: The Pig Farmer
programme.desc: Award-winning investigation into the crimes of Robert Pickton. This documentary explores why it took so many years to capture and convict Canadas most prolific serial killer. Troubling revelations about who knew what, and when.

programme.title: Killer Joe
programme.desc: When a debt puts a young mans life in danger, he turns to putting a hit out on his evil mother in order to collect the insurance.

programme.title: The Call
programme.desc: When a veteran 911 operator takes a life-altering call from a teenage girl who has just been abducted, she realizes that she must confront a killer from her past in order to save the girls life.

programme.title: Shut In
programme.desc: When a young mother is barricaded inside a pantry by her violent ex-boyfriend, she must use ingenuity to protect her two small children from escalating danger while finding an escape.

programme.title: The Junkyard Dogs
programme.desc: Follows a dog who is a master escape artist, who must team up with his puppy pals to prevent their block from being robbed.

programme.title: Hotel Dunsmuir
programme.desc: A young woman with extrasensory perception flees her abusive husband, only to land at an historic hotel containing a sinister presence.

programme.title: Rogue River
programme.desc: A woman travelling through rural Oregon to scatter her fathers ashes accepts a car ride from an old man after her car is towed.

programme.title: War Pigs
programme.desc: A ragtag unit of misfits known as the War Pigs must go behind enemy lines to exterminate Nazis by any means necessary.

programme.title: Dead Trigger
programme.desc: A mysterious virus has killed billions and turned many others into bloodthirsty zombies. Unable to stop the virus, the government develops a video game, Dead Trigger.

programme.title: Americons
programme.desc: A high-velocity journey of an unsuspecting mortgage broker swallowed up in the sex, greed and over indulgence of the mid 2000s Real Estate boom.

programme.title: Frozen Ground
programme.desc: An Alaska State Trooper partners with a young woman who escaped the clutches of serial killer Robert Hansen to bring the murderer to justice. Based on actual events.

programme.title: Detention
programme.desc: In 1962 Taiwan, student Fang and teacher Mr. Chang fall in love amidst the restrictive White Terror period banning sensitive books. Despite this, Mr. Chang secretly organizes a banned book study group with fellow teacher and student.

programme.title: Crime Story
programme.desc: An old man suffering from cancer seeks revenge on the thieves who have destroyed his life.

programme.title: The Spiderwick Chronicles
programme.desc: Upon moving into the run-down Spiderwick Estate with their mother, twin brothers Jared and Simon Grace, along with their sister Mallory, find themselves pulled into an alternate world full of faeries and other creatures.

programme.title: First Love
programme.desc: The story is described as a poignant look at a young mans difficult entry into adulthood.

programme.title: Another Mothers Son
programme.desc: Lou lives on the Nazi-occupied Island of Jersey during World War 2. She accepts to hide a young Russian POW at her house at the risk of being imprisoned herself and takes care of him as if he was her own son.

programme.title: The Colombian Connection
programme.desc: 1976 is a dangerous year in the Straits of Yucatan. Jack Hooks, a former cop set up by his corrupt partner is sent to jail for a drug crime he didnt commit.

programme.title: Cinta Di balik Awan S1 E2
programme.desc: Razi, who recently broke up with Jessica, feels there is no point in working hard as a magazine photographer. In the midst of his mental turmoil, Razi meets Jane who offers Razi a side job as a paparazzi. Eventually he accepted the offer, although at first he wanted to withdraw because the risk was too dangerous. Razi then traveled to Yogyakarta with Jane. Formerly, he wanted to help Jane meet a witch to do something on Janes fathers mistress. But the two of them unexpectedly experience an exciting and tense adventure being held hostage by the heretical sect of the Kamilia Divine Kingdom in Gunung Kidul. As a result of being together in the suffering situation, the seeds of love between Razi and Jane start to grow.

Little do they know this includes their plans for the rest of the year when the news for the early onset of the Corona-19 Virus spreading throughout Wuhan broke out that night.

programme.title: Disconnected S1 E2
programme.desc: As the backbone of his family, Angga felt immense pressure as he got laid off from his company. He continues to struggle to keep this a secret from his mother and his two best friends - especially Gigi.

programme.title: Disconnected S1 E3
programme.desc: For the first time there were no Friday prayer activities at the mosque. Fast-breaking was done virtually and people were unable to return to their hometowns to gather with their families. Renee, Gigi And Angga could not escape from the economic crisis caused by this pandemic.

programme.title: Disconnected S1 E4
programme.desc: The trio continues to adjust to their new normal, while Meydinas presence made Gigi realize the anonymity of feelings between her and her two best friends, Angga and Renee.

programme.title: Disconnected S1 E5
programme.desc: Angga, who finally got the rhythm of his online business starts to see the light at the end of the tunnel. Feeling inspired, he finally intends to express his feelings for Gigi without realizing that Renee also feels the same way towards her.

programme.title: The Death Coast, Ep 1
programme.desc: Shipwreck hunter Jeff Mackinnon explores the extremely dangerous Death Coast. The Death Coast is an area of rough sea in the North Atlantic thats claimed more than six thousand vessels across centuries.

programme.title: Swamp People S15, Ep 2
programme.desc: The life of the inhabitants of a remote place in Louisiana, who spend one month a year hunting alligators.

programme.title: Mountain Men S13, Ep 9
programme.desc: Marty is set to make waves literally by installing floats on his bush plane, allowing him to fly to a remote lake in search of moose. The excitement builds as he takes to the skies, showcasing the unique challenges and dangers of hunting in such secluded locations. Meanwhile, Lauro and Neil embark on a creative project, harvesting driftwood to construct a log river raft from scratch, demonstrating their resourcefulness and teamwork in the wilderness

programme.title: Curse Of Oak Island S12, Ep 9
programme.desc: Rick, Marty and their team return to Oak Island after a flood, discovering a new shaft that could finally lead them to the legendary Money Pit.

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle S2, Ep 12
programme.desc: An elite team is investigating the Bermuda Triangle with the aid of a secret weapon -- a map, decades in the making, marking the location of unidentified undersea wrecks and anomalies.

programme.title: Mountain Men S12, Ep 9
programme.desc: The mountains of North America hide dangers that few dare to face, but in spite of everything, some men have opted for this way of life in the wilderness.

programme.title: Gentayangan
programme.desc: After being declared bankrupt by the court, Abimanyu Karindra has no choice but to bring his wife, their two children and his sister Sheila to settle in a parents hotel in a mountain valley.

programme.title: Pengantin Pantai Biru
programme.desc: Having vacation on the beach, a group of friends hunted by a ghost bride who was raped and had her fiance killed a long time ago while honeymoon on the same place.

programme.title: Kesurupan Jumat Kliwon
programme.desc: Rocky and Cindy despair, because their love is separated by their parents. They have to be married to a chosen mate. They decide to commit suicide. two of their friends also want to do it. But, before it, all intend to go holiday together.

programme.title: Senggol-Senggolan
programme.desc: Elvi and Adi who are orphans go to Jakarta to find Johny, a show promoter who once asked Elvi to sing in his village. Once there, they got separated.

programme.title: Kawin Kontrak 3
programme.desc: Gerry replaces Kang Sono as a contract marriage broker. Ceppy, Itol, and Dani finally marry their dream women and start their new unique lives.

programme.title: Benyamin Musuh Bebuyutan
programme.desc: The constant fight between the two poor families finally causes their houses to burn down. The head of the neighbourhood, finally sends them off to the transmigration area.

programme.title: Cowok Bikin Pusing
programme.desc: This movie tells the story about a pair of young love who once hurt by their former lovers. They finally fall in love and must overcome obstacles threatening their relationship.

programme.title: Soekarno
programme.desc: From fragile beginnings to fiery orations, a man named Soekarno rises with an unshakable spirit. Love, sacrifice, and bold visions shape his journey, as destiny pushes him closer to a nation’s long-awaited awakening.

programme.title: Hattrick
programme.desc: A football team who has differences and ego problems must win an International underground football tournament in order to save their own lives.

programme.title: 100% Halal
programme.desc: When she was just learning to cultivate love, Anisa Santosa, who had just married young to Putra Alfatih the husband of choice for her father, Ilham Santosa.

programme.title: 48 Jam Untuk Indah
programme.desc: The story of a middle class man about how he will save his daughter from her sudden illness.

programme.title: Hotline 666
programme.desc: Erza is a pizza deliverer who never believed in fairy tales. One day, he get order to deliver pizza to a haunted house and locked overnight in there.

programme.title: Tumbal 97
programme.desc: The death of famous artist Saeful Djamils wife, draws Pristas attention. At the time of taking pictures at the scene of the accident, Prista startles when she sees a shadow of an old blond granny on her pictures.

programme.title: Skandal (IMC)

programme.title: Maju Kena Mundur Kena (IMC)

programme.title: Dunia Mereka (IMC)

programme.desc: Run wild with two troops of long-tailed macaques that rule the forests of Singapore. Spy on turf wars, see alpha males battle for supremacy and explore the complex lives of these sassy primates.

programme.title: Deep Dive North... S1, Ep 1
programme.desc: Embark on an unforgettable journey with wildlife biologist Lizzie Daly through North America’s most breathtaking coastlines. Marvel at the flourishing wildlife and the people who are risking it all to preserve and protect these watery Edens.

programme.title: Gladiators S1, Ep 2
programme.desc: Unlock the killer secrets and ingenious tactics of nature’s toughest fighters. Travel to four incredible ecosystems around the world where wild gladiators, from the smallest ants to the biggest bears, do battle for the ultimate prize: survival.

programme.title: Survival Of The Beast S1, Ep 3
programme.desc: Prepare for a completely new way of looking at the animal kingdom with adventurer, survivalist, and zoology nut Max Djenohan. Max is on a mission. To unlock and mimic the survival skills of some of the most charismatic animals on Earth.

programme.title: Cinta Fitri
programme.desc: Fitri is innocent, dorky, cheerful, and kind. Her full name is Fitri Rahayu. This 19-year-old girl never harbors any prejudices against others. As her wedding day approaches, Fitri comes to Jakarta to meet Firmans family, her future husband. Tragically, the long-dreamed-of wedding turns into a heartbreaking story.

programme.title: Keluarga Yang Tak Dirindukan

programme.title: Terlanjur Indah
programme.desc: A stunning hijabi woman called Indah is pushed by her mother and sister to exploit her beauty for financial gain. A kind man tries to rescue her through marriage, but gets rejected by her family. Then, she meets a rich guy who initially hates her, only to fall deeply in love.

programme.title: Cinta Fitri S7
programme.desc: The final season shows the Hutama family mourning Oma’s death. Mischa returns seeking revenge and plans to kidnap Raffa. Amid conflicts, illness, and pressure, Fitri and Farrel struggle to keep their family united through love.

programme.title: BIOSKOP KELUARGA INDONESIA (SUPA STRIKAS: FINAL YANG MENGGUNCANG DUNIA)
programme.desc: Indonesian Family Cinema is a childrens television program that offers exciting and educational viewing options for the whole family. Featuring entertaining animated films and engaging stories, this show presents fun-filled adventures with meaningful moral messages that can be enjoyed together. The program becomes a valuable moment for Indonesian families to come together and spend quality time in unforgettable enjoyment.

programme.title: POKEMON SEASON 25: ULTIMATE JOURNEYS
programme.desc: POKEMON ULTIMATE JOURNEY IS AN ANIMATED TELEVISION SERIES THAT FOLLOWS THE ADVENTURES OF ASH KETCHUM, A YOUNG POKEMON TRAINER, AND HIS FAITHFUL PIKACHU AS THEY CONTINUE THEIR JOURNEY TO BECOME POKEMON MASTERS. ALONG THE JOURNEY, ASH MEETS NEW FRIENDS, RIVALS, AND POKEMON AS HE COMPETES IN VARIOUS POKEMON BATTLES AND TOURNAMENTS.

programme.title: KELUARGA SOMAT
programme.desc: THE SOMAT FAMILY TELLS THAT WE MUST LIVE SIDE BY SIDE AND HELP EACH OTHER AS A COMMUNITY AND AS STUDENTS.

programme.title: PLENTIS KENTUS
programme.desc: PLENTIS KENTUS IS A POPULAR INDONESIAN CHILDRENS ANIMATION WITH CHEERFUL AND UPbeat SONGS. THEY WERE CREATED AS A FORM OF INNOVATION IN THE CHILDRENS MUSIC INDUSTRY IN INDONESIA. PLENTIS AND KENTUS ARE TWO BEST FRIENDS WHO ARE STILL IN ELEMENTARY SCHOOL. BOTH HAVE BIG DREAMS TO BECOME FAMOUS SINGERS. THEY LOVE SINGING, COMposing SONGS, AND PERFORMING AT VARIOUS EVENTS. THEIR ADVENTURES ARE FULL OF FUN, FRIENDSHIP, AND OF COURSE, LOTS OF SONGS THAT CAN MAKE CHILDREN SING AND SHOOT.

programme.title: BEDU DAN ADUL
programme.desc: BEDU AND ADUL IS A 3D ANIMATED FILM SERIAL ABOUT THE ADVENTURES OF CHILDREN IN THE MULTICULTURAL SUBURBS OF JAKARTA. THEIR INQUIRIES MAKE THEM WANTED TO EXPLORE, SOMETIMES CAUSING A FUCKING FUCK.

programme.title: MADUN
programme.desc: The Madun series tells the story of Madun (16 years old) and his journey to achieve his dream of becoming a soccer player. His father, Syafei (50 years old), who is of Medan descent, really wants his son to become an Islamic teacher. Because of this, Syafei always hinders Maduns efforts to achieve his dream. For him, Madun only has one choice, which is to become a religious scholar. Maduns mother, Kirana, a native of Batavia, is torn. She must obey her husband, who is anti-soccer. However, on the other hand, she also does not want to prevent Madun from realizing his dreams. She cannot bear to restrain Madun, who loves soccer. However, to realize his dream, Madun faces a lot of competition.

programme.title: Oddbods
programme.desc: Oddbods is an animated, slapstick comedy that embraces adventure and celebrates friendship. Following the wacky adventures of eight unique and furry friends, who laugh, play and get up to mischief in their hometown of Oddsville, where even the most ordinary of situations have unexpected outcomes.

programme.title: Little Angel
programme.desc: Little Angel is an animated musical show for pre-schoolers. The show has been captivating families around the world with its cheeky humor and catchy upbeat songs.

programme.title: COCOMELON IND
programme.desc: With Indonesian-language 3D animations and songs, Cocomelon creates a world centered around the everyday experiences of young children. In addition to helping preschoolers learn letters, numbers, animal sounds, colors, and more, the videos provide lessons in social skills. They give parents the opportunity to teach and play with their children as they watch together.

programme.title: PORORO AND TAYO SONGS
programme.desc: Watch music videos for Pororo, Tayo, and their friends!

programme.title: NUMBERBLOCKS
programme.desc: Numberblocks is an educational animated series for preschoolers that teaches mathematical concepts through lively, adventurous number block characters. Each number block has its own numerical value and unique personality. They join forces and interact with each other to solve mathematical problems while teaching basic mathematical concepts such as addition, subtraction, multiplication, division, and other concepts. Each episode of “Numberblocks” typically features a short story in which the number blocks work together to complete a task or face a mathematical challenge. Through songs, engaging stories, and bright visuals, the series aims to introduce and reinforce childrens understanding of numbers and basic mathematical concepts in a fun and interactive way.

programme.title: PINKFONG And FRIENDS
programme.desc: Each episode features a new story that is both entertaining and educational, with interactive moments that invite children to guess, sing, and share in the joy with the characters.

programme.title: TAYO, THE LITTLE BUS
programme.desc: In a big city where various vehicles happily coexist, the little bus Tayo has just started learning his route around town. There are many things for Tayo to learn. Tayo and his friends, Rogi, Lani, and Gani, help each other to become great grown-up buses.

programme.title: KATURI
programme.desc: Katuri is an exciting show about four peacock chicks growing up in a natural forest under the gentle care and affection of Mother Flora. Mother Flora always encourages her children to explore the world with other animals and helps them whenever they need it. When the peacock chicks encounter difficulties or even danger, Mother Flora is always there to keep them safe.

programme.title: PORORO, THE LITTLE PENGUIN
programme.desc: Pororo the little penguin and his friends live in a peaceful land covered in snow and ice. They all have different personalities and interests, which sometimes cause a little trouble in their quiet winter world. But together, every day is an adventure where they learn all of lifes lessons, big and small!

programme.title: RAINBOW BUBBLEGEM
programme.desc: In the underwater world, a mermaid named Purple longs for adventures on land and secretly takes a huge risk by transforming herself into a human. With the help of Pink Star, the sleeping guardian fairy of the bubblegem, Purple transforms. However, the excessive use of magic causes the bubblegem, their source of power, to shatter and scatter across the land. To gather the scattered bubblegems, the sea queen White Gold commands seven mermaids from different sea kingdoms.

programme.title: BLUEY
programme.desc: Bluey is an Australian animated series that follows the daily adventures of a six-year-old blue heeler puppy named Bluey. Together with her younger brother, Bingo, and her parents, Bandit and Chilli, Bluey engages in imaginative games that spark curiosity and creativity.

programme.title: TIAN TIAN
programme.desc: A simple family from the big city decides to leave the glitz and glamour of urban life behind and return to the village for the sake of their child, who is afraid to go to school. In the village, they interact with friends, neighbors, and local animals, causing endless awkward and funny situations. However, amid all the silliness, there are also touching moments of togetherness, where laughter and tears go hand in hand. Tiantian, the six-year-old child, full of curiosity and love for the world, begins to develop into a healthy, independent, and confident person amidst the beauty of the countryside.

programme.title: CIPUNG ABUBU SEASON 2
programme.desc: Cipung, Zayn, Zuney, and Rafathar are now ready for a new adventure! Together, they will solve various problems and carry out rescue missions using high-tech tools and vehicles from Bobas World.

programme.title: BING
programme.desc: Lets get to know Bing, a cute and curious little rabbit! Together with his beloved adult friend, Flop, Bing always finds exciting new things every day. From playing with bubbles, tying shoelaces, to overcoming sadness, everything becomes a fun adventure! Come on, follow the adventures of Bing and his friends! We can learn many things while laughing, you know!

programme.title: MAGIC 5 THE ANIMATION
programme.desc: MAGIC 5 THE ANIMATION TELLS THE ADVENTURES OF FIVE SPECIAL TEENS—NAURA, RAHSYA, ADARA, GIBRAN, AND IRSHAD—WHICH ARE FOUND AND CARED FOR BY FATHIR. THESE FIVE CHILDREN HAVE UNIQUE AND DIFFERENT SUPERPOWERS. THEY USE THESE POWERS TO SOLVE VARIOUS CASES AND PROBLEMS THAT OCCUR AROUND THEM. IN ADDITION TO RESCUE MISSIONS, THEY ALSO HAVE TO FACE DAILY CONFLICTS AT SCHOOL, ESPECIALLY FROM THEIR ENEMY GANG, THE BEAST. THIS ANIMATION FOCUS ON THE STORY OF FRIENDSHIP, COHESION, AND THE USE OF SUPERPOWERS FOR GOOD.

programme.title: NEW KELUARGA SOMAT
programme.desc: FOLLOW THE EXCITING ADVENTURES OF PAK SOMATS FAMILY AS THEY STARTED A NEW LIFE IN CITEKO! FROM BUILDING BU INAHS DREAM STORE, THE EXCITEMENT OF BEING NEIGHBORS WITH CEU KOKOM, TO PAK SOMATS STRUGGLE TO BECOME AN ONLINE MOTORCYCLE TAXI FOR THE SAKE OF HIS FAMILY. A WARM STORY FULL OF LAUGHTER AND A MORAL MESSAGE SUITABLE FOR ALL AGES.

programme.title: BIOSKOP KELUARGA INDONESIA (MUSUH TAK TERDUGA SHUKE And BEITA!)
programme.desc: In a quiet little town, two mouse heroes Shuke, the brave and clever pilot, and Beita, the easy going yet loyal tankist are taken by surprise when an unexpected enemy emerges, hidden beneath the calm of their world.

programme.title: POKEMON SEASON 25: ULTIMATE JOURNEYS
programme.desc: POKEMON ULTIMATE JOURNEY IS AN ANIMATED TELEVISION SERIES THAT FOLLOWS THE ADVENTURES OF ASH KETCHUM, A YOUNG POKEMON TRAINER, AND HIS FAITHFUL PIKACHU AS THEY CONTINUE THEIR JOURNEY TO BECOME POKEMON MASTERS. programme.title: Headline News
programme.desc: Headline News is a flagship news program delivering a summary of the latest national and international events with fast and accurate reporting.

programme.title: Primetime News

programme.desc: The latest talent search program from MNC TV to find quality dangdut singers.

programme.desc: The story is about an Arab family living in the city of Jakarta, where the Aba wants to maintain Arabic traditions in his family and work in the modernization era.

programme.title: Siraman Qolbu
programme.desc: Spiritual inspiration for Muslims with exemplary ustadz and ustadzah.

programme.title: Roy And Marten Sahabat Sehidup Semati S1 E10
programme.desc: This series follows the story of two close friends, Roy (Tanta Ginting) and Marten (Gading Marten). One day, Roy asks Marten to help open his spiritual perception so that he may communicate with the spirit of his deceased father.

programme.title: Kiko
programme.desc: Kiko tells of a child of a goldfish who is very independent, even though he is an only child. Kiko who is always cheerful has four good friends, namely Lola the discus fish, Ting Ting the crab, Patino the catfish and Poli the betta fish. On the other hand, the antagonists, Karkus the catfish and Pupus the eel, always make Kikos life chaotic. One day, the lake where Kiko lives is polluted due to the reckless acts of humans, causing Kiko and friends to turn into mutants.

programme.title: Bedah Rumah Lagi S4 E5
programme.desc: Bedah Rumah Lagi is a television program that transforms uninhabitable homes of underprivileged families into safe and comfortable living spaces, while also presenting stories of struggle and new hope for the families.

programme.title: Bedah Rumah Lagi S4 E6
programme.desc: Bedah Rumah Lagi is a television program that transforms uninhabitable homes of underprivileged families into safe and comfortable living spaces, while also presenting stories of struggle and new hope for the families.

programme.title: Preman Pensiun - Kembali ke Fitri
programme.desc: Muslihat has returned to her hometown, planning to renovate the mosque there to make it better and bigger. The kicimpring business has progressed a lot since it was held by Ujang who was assisted by Serena. Behind the successful kicimpring business, Ujang is caught in a love affair.

programme.title: Temen Ngekost S1 E2
programme.desc: The love dynamics of the three couples in South House boarding house are varied and full of drama. Elang and Elin always fight over small things. Jose and Lina rarely quarrel but they communicate to each other using harsh words. Then there are Dian and Opay, where Dian is suspicious about her partner, that she violates Opays personal space.

programme.title: Lintas iNews Siang
programme.desc: A news program that airs every afternoon, conveying the facts as they are, without any manipulation, and presenting the latest and most up-to-date news.

programme.title: Seleb On News
programme.desc: An infotainment program that reports the latest information and rumors about Indonesian celebrities.

programme.title: Ada Dewa Disisiku S1 E2
programme.desc: BARA is the son of the sky god - NARENDRA, who is the strongest god of the gods. Growing up as his fathers successor, Bara became very arrogant, making troubles in gods world. As punishment, Narendra send Bara to the Earth and gave him a task to helped Melatis problem.

programme.title: Daur Hidup S1 E1
programme.desc: To deepen the role he played, Omar had to return to his former place of residence, the place where all his traumas piled up.

programme.title: Daur Hidup S1 E2
programme.desc: Having Aspergers Syndrome makes it difficult for Eri to make friends. The situation is even more difficult when he accidentally complains about the mistakes of one of his classmates, Banyu, to his teacher.

programme.title: Daur Hidup S1 E3
programme.desc: The family situation made Dilla lose her passion for dancing. Marcelia is a mentor as well as a person she longs for, she is also the one who motivates Dilla to return to dancing.

programme.title: Daur Hidup S1 E4
programme.desc: Its been 7 years since Yayas has refused Dions invitation, which keeps forcing him to go home. Its been 7 years since Mother thought Yayas was dead. Until finally Yayas decided to return.

programme.title: Daur Hidup S1 E5
programme.desc: Enduring an unhealthy relationship requires Abi and Rani to find out what went wrong with their relationship and the reasons that caused them to separate.

programme.title: Daur Hidup S1 E6
programme.desc: Sasha, a cold student, goes on an adventure with Lukman, an innocent student to leave her past behind.

programme.title: Daur Hidup S1 E7
programme.desc: Dwi and Tere, a husband and wife whose relationship has been strained. After the bullying incident led by their child, they also have to re-evaluate their parenting method as well as their relationship so far.

programme.title: Daur Hidup S1 E8
programme.desc: After receiving an awkward farewell message from a friend of theirs, the three friends decided to regroup to redefine the friendship they had made so far.

programme.title: Daur Hidup S1 E9
programme.desc: When his father fell into a coma, Rio, who had not set foot in the house for years, finally reunited with Ardi and Meira.

programme.title: Kiko
programme.desc: Kiko tells of a child of a goldfish who is very independent, even though he is an only child. Kiko who is always cheerful has four good friends, namely Lola the discus fish, Ting Ting the crab, Patino the catfish and Poli the betta fish. On the other hand, the antagonists, Karkus the catfish and Pupus the eel, always make Kikos life chaotic. One day, the lake where Kiko lives is polluted due to the reckless acts of humans, causing Kiko and friends to turn into mutants.

programme.title: Rosanjins Stove, Ep 4
programme.desc: A young reporter named Yoneko (Furukawa Kotone) visits Rosanjin (Fuji Tatsuya) in his later years, a towering figure in Japanese culinary and artistic aesthetics. Though bewildered by his imperious and self-centered behavior, she continues to call on him to take dictation for his memoir. As she witnesses his interactions with distinguished figures—including Yoshida Shigeru, Noguchi Isamu, and John D. Rockefeller III—Yoneko slowly begins to understand the real Rosanjin: a man who, for all his sharp words, regards cuisine as a form of art and pursues it with unwavering, uncompromising dedication.

programme.title: Radio Star, Ep 14

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: The legendary Marsupilamis swap the wild Palombian jungle for an even wilder place: the city. There, twins Jade and Mica find their world turned upside down when their explorer parents entrust them with three mysterious Marsupilami eggs. Once they hatch, the siblings must get creative to keep their new friends hidden after all, no one knows these energetic creatures exist, and predators could be lurking around every corner.
