programme.title: Full Out 2: You Got This!
programme.desc: When the University of Oklahoma Sooners lose their star gymnast, Brenna Dowell, the rest of the team have to find a way to believe in themselves in order to win their second National Gymnastics Championship. With the help of Riley, a local breakdancing phenomenon, Chayse and her OU teammates learn to incorporate intricate breakdance techniques into their gymnastics routines in order to find a competitive edge. At the end of it all, they realize what matters most is finding the confidence to believe in yourself.

programme.title: Dark Corners: The Stalker
programme.desc: Susan lives a seemingly normal life but begins experiencing recurring nightmares about a serial killer stalking her. In these dreams, she exists as another woman named Karen, a mortuary assistant hunted by a mysterious “stalker.”

programme.desc: When two immigrant kids on the run from his former South Los Angeles gang leader stumble into his life, John is forced to reconcile with his past in order to try and give them a future.

programme.desc: The story follows a group of old friends who reunite after many years apart. Each of them has lived a different life, carrying personal stories, unresolved wounds, and memories from the past.

programme.title: Het Leven Volgens Nino
programme.desc: Life is good for Nino van Doorn (8). He has a terrific brother Lucas (14), wise father Bruno and an angel of a mother, Marla. When Marla dies, Bruno cant cope with her death. Also the values like order, responsibility, love and care they represented. The two brothers create their own world. But soon the anarchistic world is threatened by the outside world. The two brothers are prepared to fool the system but what happens is that they really become a family again.

programme.desc: In 1960s London, an elderly janitor convinces a glass-ceiling constrained executive to help him steal a handful of diamonds from their employer, the London Diamond Corporation.

programme.title: Peter Bell
programme.desc: There is never a dull moment in 10-year-old Peters life; his adventures appearing in newspaper headlines based unfortunately on outright lies. Together with his own little army, The Black Hand Club, Peter decides to right these wrongs.

programme.title: Dark Corners: The Stalker
programme.desc: Susan lives a seemingly normal life but begins experiencing recurring nightmares about a serial killer stalking her. In these dreams, she exists as another woman named Karen, a mortuary assistant hunted by a mysterious “stalker.”

programme.title: Heartwarming Stories: Reunion
programme.desc: The story follows a group of old friends who reunite after many years apart. Each of them has lived a different life, carrying personal stories, unresolved wounds, and memories from the past.

programme.title: Mystery Road
programme.desc: An indigenous detective returns to the Outback to investigate the murder of a young girl.

programme.title: Red Dog
programme.desc: Based on the legendary true story of the Red Dog who united a disparate local community while roaming the Australian outback in search of his long lost master.

programme.title: Dark Corners: The Stalker

programme.title: Heartwarming Stories: Reunion

programme.title: Faith Of Angels

programme.title: Showdown Of Unbeatables, Ep 5

programme.title: Croc College S1, Ep 5
programme.desc: Croc College follows six ordinary Australians as they embark on one of the most thrilling and dangerous training courses Australia has to offer. Led by Queensland croc legend John Lever, the students learn how to handle, farm and manage the worlds oldest and largest living reptile - the saltwater crocodile. They also study the hardcore and sometimes ethically confronting business side to croc farming, and some take part in a groundbreaking scientific artificial insemination project.

programme.title: Liputan 6 Siang (L)

programme.title: Runaway Demi Cinta
programme.desc: Because she is upset about having a stepmother, Indah Permatasari as Alin runs away from home. While confused about where to go, she meets Qausar Harta Yudana as Iwan, who is sewing and has also run away. Alin misunderstands and thinks Iwan is following her, when in fact he is afraid of encountering Irma—Alin’s stepmother and also his former boss.

programme.title: Wanted: Abang Duda Sempurna
programme.desc: Naufal and Nayla plan to set Adi up so he can get closer to Vanya. As a result, they prank Adi and Vanya by having Naufal pretend that Nayla is drowning in a lake.

programme.title: I Love You 1 Miliar Dibayar...
programme.desc: Melody and Bryan kept arguing because Bryan had hit Melodys older brother, until finally Melody agreed to marry him as long as the dowry was 1 billion, Bryan finally gave in to his love for Melody and wanted to marry him even though the dowry was expensive.

programme.title: Asmara Gen Z
programme.desc: Three young men in love must choose between a girl who is infatuated with him or a girl who can only hide her feelings. Who will Fattah choose to fill his youthful love story?

programme.title: Istiqomah Cinta (SCTV)
programme.desc: Khansa, a gentle and devout woman, navigates life with sacrifices she never chose. Her kindness, however, drags her into a series of wounds, slander, and secrets from her past that are slowly revealed.

programme.title: Beri Cinta Waktu

programme.title: Jejak Duka Diandra
programme.desc: Diandra thought love would save her life. Her marriage to Dimitri instead dragged her into a whirlpool of slander, secrets, and bitter choices that changed everything. With wounds still unhealed, they met again.

programme.title: Preman Sadis Jadi Romantis
programme.desc: One day, Remon receives news that his father, Pak Komar, has passed away. After his late mother died, his father remarried and continued his life in the city. Remon was simply left behind, as since childhood he had been closer to and more obedient to Bi Ijah, his aunt.

programme.title: Cantik-Cantik Supir Omprengan
programme.desc: Maemuhan (Andrea Bimo) chooses to become an informal taxi driver after graduating with a bachelor’s degree. In truth, it isn’t what Mae wants—he’s simply tired of not finding a job, even though his parents are the wealthiest people in his village. Eventually, Mae and his friends try to earn money by working as informal drivers. Things change when Mae meets Kevin (Kiki Farel) during a job interview at Kevin’s office. However, Kevin rejects him because Mae’s friends often park their cars in front of his office, blocking Kevin’s vehicle.

programme.desc: We follow Amy Adams to her Vogue cover shoot with Annie Leibovitz and ask her 73 questions about her life and what we can expect to see from her next.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Cindy Crawford
programme.desc: A day in the life of supermodel Cindy Crawford includes working out, lunching with Helena Christensen, and lighting the Empire State Building.

programme.title: Ancient Quest
programme.desc: Ancient Quest

programme.title: 24 Hours With BTS In L.A.
programme.desc: as a global K-pop phenomenon with their first major visit to Los Angeles, where the seven-member band was greeted by rabid crowds and an onslaught of media attention. On a rare free evening toward the end of their whirlwind trip right after the AMAs, just before Ellen the boys boarded a party bus with Vogue and took the city by storm.

programme.title: The Time Of Secrets
programme.desc: Marcel Pagnol embarks on his last summer vacation before high school and returns to his beloved hills in Provence. His summer of boyhood adventures becomes one of first loves and secrets.

programme.title: Come And Find Me
programme.desc: When Davids girlfriend Claire seems to have left him when he wakes up one morning, he discovers more than a year later that she probably wasnt named Claire at all, and that she was involved in something that was dangerous. David travels from Seattle to Vancouver to find out what.

programme.title: The Case Of Disappearances
programme.desc: When Qing Cheng was a teenager, he was attacked by an unknown mutant monster and lost his family and memory. He was regarded by the villagers as an ominous person who would bring disaster.

programme.title: Sinister, Ep 4
programme.desc: An anthology series about the evil creatures who lurk in the shadows of our world and want nothing more than to do bad, bad things.

programme.title: Waning moon
programme.desc: Nuan-chan, who sufferings with painful past which compels her to perform duties of holy medium in a remotely backward village.

programme.title: Impermanence
programme.desc: A series of strange events is happening in a peaceful village, including a corpse that is resurrected from its grave and ran away. As the villagers investigate, a villain dies and the village head also goes missing.

programme.title: Behave
programme.desc: After the death of their friend, a group of eccentric young adults are whisked away to a villa on the outskirts of London, but a mysterious entity seems to have followed them to their luxurious getaway.

programme.title: Ten Minutes To Midnight
programme.desc: Bitten by a rabid bat, a late-night radio host terrorizes her co-workers as she slowly transforms into a vampire.

programme.desc: An anthology series about the evil creatures who lurk in the shadows of our world and want nothing more than to do bad, bad things.

programme.desc: Trapped in an abandoned house, a nameless man desperately searches for clues to how he got there. The answer is hidden within a series of disturbing viral videos each of which begins to infect his mind.

programme.desc: Fraternal twins spend a hellish night at the remote inn their father disappeared from the night they were born.

programme.desc: After their father passes away, two siblings return to their old family farm to sell off the land. However, darker forces may be at play that will force them to reanalyze their relation to their ancestors land.

programme.title: LE POINT
programme.desc: Through its reporters spread across the whole of Canada and the four corners of the world, the magazine Le Point gives a true testimony of what is happening in the major areas of Canada, Europe, Asia, Africa, the USA and Latin America.

programme.title: LE JOURNAL DE FRANCE 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (8 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: MAUVAISE GRAINE
programme.desc: On a city housing estate, Sadia is involved in mysterious illegal dealings. Coming across her by surprise, her boyfriend Arthur discovers her secret. He now has to make a choice.

programme.title: YA BENTI
programme.desc: Ya Benti shares intimate stories of women facing cultural, social, and personal challenges, highlighting resilience and identity.

programme.title: PANIER DE CRABES
programme.desc: Panier de Crabes follows a tense investigation uncovering corruption, power struggles, and personal betrayals within a complex social network.

programme.title: ALEX HUGO
programme.desc: Alex Hugo follows a former city police officer who now lives in a remote mountain region, solving complex criminal cases while seeking peace from his past. The series combines mystery, action, and emotional depth against stunning natural backdrops.

programme.title: TENDANCE XXI
programme.desc: The restoration of Notre-Dame de Paris: a fabulous architectural adventure. Right or left, all you need to know about placing buttons. Duvelleroy brings the fan firmly up to date. How best to wear a coat dress? In the Luberon, the Domaine des Andeols brings craftwork and contemporary art together.

programme.title: MEURTRES À CHARTRES
programme.desc: Meurtres à Chartres follows detectives as they investigate a mysterious killing linked to the rich history of Chartres. As clues emerge, the case uncovers hidden secrets tied to the city’s past, leading to a complex and suspenseful resolution.

programme.title: CHÂTEAU !
programme.desc: CHÂTEAU ! takes viewers inside remarkable French castles, revealing their architectural secrets, legendary residents, and historical transformations. Blending expert commentary with stunning visuals, the series uncovers the cultural heritage preserved within these iconic landmarks.

programme.title: 64 ACTU
programme.desc: 64 Actu delivers in-depth coverage of national and international news, combining reports, analysis, and expert commentary to provide context behind the headlines.

programme.title: 64 DÉBAT
programme.desc: 64 Debat brings journalists, experts, and commentators together to discuss key political, social, and economic topics shaping today’s world.

programme.title: LINVITÉ
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: VERSION FRANÇAISE
programme.desc: Telling real from fake at the Paris Museum of Counterfeit Goods. Multi-talented designer with a passion for Paris, Marin Montagut takes us on a poetic journey. Pieter Mulier treads in the footsteps of the founder of Maison Alaïa. Fantastic animals and floral motifs on every finger with jeweller Fusako Koike.

programme.title: CHRONIQUES DEN HAUT
programme.desc: Chroniques d’en Haut presents breathtaking landscapes and human stories from mountainous areas, focusing on nature, heritage, and resilient communities.

programme.title: LE JOURNAL AFRIQUE
programme.desc: Le Journal Afrique provides comprehensive coverage of political, economic, and social developments across the African continent with on-the-ground reporting.

programme.title: SLAM
programme.desc: Three contestants compete in a game of arrow crosswords, trying to complete the grids by finding the answers to the definitions provided. But to have access to those definitions, they first need to answer questions that all share one common characteristic: the response is always a letter.

programme.title: LE TÉLÉJOURNAL DE RADIO-CANADA
programme.desc: Le Telejournal de Radio-Canada delivers comprehensive national and international news coverage, featuring in-depth reporting, analysis, and live updates.

programme.title: LAFRIK EN CONTES
programme.desc: LAFRIK EN CONTES brings to life traditional African tales through colorful animation and engaging storytelling. Each episode shares moral lessons, humor, and cultural heritage, introducing young audiences to legendary characters and timeless wisdom passed down through generations.

programme.title: LA PETITE POKOU
programme.desc: La Petite Pokou recounts a legendary story of a young princess faced with an impossible decision to save her people. The tale highlights themes of bravery, sacrifice, and leadership rooted in cultural heritage.

programme.title: IL ÉTAIT UNE FOIS... CES DRÔLES DOBJETS
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: LES NOUVELLES AVENTURES DE KAELOO
programme.desc: In Super-Cute-Land, Kaeloo, Stumpy, Quack-Quack and Mr. Cat play a new game every day. And for that they love nothing better than making up their own rules and asking loads of questions about the world around them: with this lot you can never be sure of what will happen next!

programme.title: OUM LE DAUPHIN BLANC
programme.desc: OUM LE DAUPHIN BLANC follows young Yann and his loyal white dolphin, Oum, as they protect the marine world from threats and uncover island mysteries. Set in tropical waters, the series blends friendship, environmental awareness, and thrilling adventures for young audiences.

programme.title: OUM LE DAUPHIN BLANC
programme.desc: OUM LE DAUPHIN BLANC follows young Yann and his loyal white dolphin, Oum, as they protect the marine world from threats and uncover island mysteries. Set in tropical waters, the series blends friendship, environmental awareness, and thrilling adventures for young audiences.

programme.desc: All the news and plenty of good humour, 7 days a week! Very much in tune with the times, Frances leading morning show, with its varied editorial content and dynamic team, tackles a wide range of subjects, treating current affairs seriously without turning them into a drama.

programme.title: LE GOÛT DES RENCONTRES EN NOUVELLE-AQUITAINE
programme.desc: Le Goût des Rencontres en Nouvelle-Aquitaine explores regional gastronomy through encounters with local producers, chefs, and artisans, celebrating food and human connection.

programme.title: SLAM
programme.desc: Three contestants compete in a game of arrow crosswords, trying to complete the grids by finding the answers to the definitions provided. But to have access to those definitions, they first need to answer questions that all share one common characteristic: the response is always a letter.

programme.title: LE TÉLÉJOURNAL DE RADIO-CANADA
programme.desc: Le Telejournal de Radio-Canada delivers comprehensive national and international news coverage, featuring in-depth reporting, analysis, and live updates.

programme.title: UNE BRIQUE DANS LE VENTRE
programme.desc: Une Brique dans le Ventre features creative home renovation projects, interior design ideas, and architectural inspiration, guided by expert hosts.

programme.title: ESCAPADES EN SUISSE ITALIENNE
programme.desc: Escapades en Suisse Italienne travels through Ticino and surrounding regions, showcasing landscapes, culture, and lifestyle unique to Italian Switzerland.

programme.title: LAFRIK EN CONTES
programme.desc: LAFRIK EN CONTES brings to life traditional African tales through colorful animation and engaging storytelling. Each episode shares moral lessons, humor, and cultural heritage, introducing young audiences to legendary characters and timeless wisdom passed down through generations.

programme.title: LA PETITE POKOU
programme.desc: La Petite Pokou recounts a legendary story of a young princess faced with an impossible decision to save her people. The tale highlights themes of bravery, sacrifice, and leadership rooted in cultural heritage.

programme.title: IL ÉTAIT UNE FOIS... CES DRÔLES DOBJETS
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: LIMAGIER ANIMÉ DE KOUMI
programme.desc: At 6 years old the cheerful mischievous Koumi dreams of knowing all the animals in the world. Thanks to her picture book, shes able to head off and meet them.

programme.title: BELLES COMPTINES DAFRIQUE
programme.desc: Belles Comptines dAfrique presents traditional African nursery rhymes through music and animation. The program introduces children to cultural diversity while entertaining and educating them.

programme.title: OSCAR ET MALIKA, TOUJOURS EN RETARD
programme.desc: Oscar et Malika, Toujours en Retard follows two children who, on their way to school, are constantly delayed by extraordinary adventures involving magical worlds and strange creatures. Each episode blends humor, fantasy, and life lessons as they struggle to arrive on time.

programme.title: OSCAR ET MALIKA, TOUJOURS EN RETARD
programme.desc: Oscar et Malika, Toujours en Retard follows two children who, on their way to school, are constantly delayed by extraordinary adventures involving magical worlds and strange creatures. Each episode blends humor, fantasy, and life lessons as they struggle to arrive on time.

programme.title: TOUT LE MONDE VEUT PRENDRE SA PLACE

programme.title: Killing Romance
programme.desc: A retired actress who marries an island chaebol and meets a 3-time-test-taker who lives next door.

programme.title: Streaming (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Follows a mystery streamer with the largest number of subscribers, broadcasting the process of uncovering clues to an unsolved serial murder case in real time.

programme.title: The Glorious My Revenge (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Three years after the expiration of the ten year statute of limitations, police detective Ryoo Yi-jae meets the man who killed his son in a hit and run accident.

programme.title: The Tiger
programme.desc: While the Kingdom of Korea is under occupation by the Japanese, an old and experienced hunter is challenged by the hunt of the last tiger.

programme.title: Hijack 1971
programme.desc: The movie depics the story of people fighting for their lives in an extreme situation when a passenger plane is hijacked in the airspace of Korea in 1971.

programme.title: The Presidents Barber
programme.desc: A man and his family get tangled in decades of political chaos when he was appointed as the presidents personal barber.

programme.title: A Year-End Medley
programme.desc: From awkward first love to crush on a friend and long forgotten love, 14 love-struck individuals are brought together at Hotel Emross on New Years Eve.

programme.title: Oh! My Ghost
programme.desc: A comical horror movie portraying a late-year job seeker, Tae Min, who is able to see ghosts through his specs as he gets a job in a studio where mysterious incidents happen every night.

programme.title: Dont Go Too Far

programme.title: Innocence
programme.desc: A hotshot lawyer uncovers the conspiracy of a small village while defending her estranged mother, who has Alzheimers disease and accused of killing the attendees at her husbands funeral.

programme.title: Spiritwalker

programme.title: The Witch: The Other One

programme.title: Deadman
programme.desc: A man so-called figurehead, who makes money out of his name, living as a Dead man after being falsely accused of embezzlement of 100 billion won.

programme.title: Bear Man
programme.desc: Two bears from the Institute of techonolgy have turned into humans after eating garlic and mugwort. Yet, one has grown up into a police, while one has become a gangster.

programme.title: The Hot-Blooded

programme.desc: A docudrama telling the story of the events that unfolded when a Scottish army led by Robert Bruce tried to drive the English out of Scotland 700 years ago.

programme.title: Dying For A Baby
programme.desc: Amber and Kyle are ready to move on after a car accident two years ago. But their world turns upside-down when Jessica, the other driver, who lost her unborn baby in the accident, moves in next door and gets a job with Ambers doctor, all in her plan to wreak cold revenge.

programme.title: Code Of A Killer, Pt 1
programme.desc: Leicestershire, 1984. Alec Jeffreys, a scientist at Leicester University, unlocks a remarkable technique to read every individuals unique DNA fingerprint. Only four miles away, DCS David Baker is a tenacious detective leading the search for the murderer of a local schoolgirl.

programme.title: Love On Your Doorstep

programme.desc: Years after a detrimental accident splits them apart, two foster families come together to celebrate the Thanksgiving holiday and reconcile the past. Easier said than done.

programme.title: Blueprint To The Heart

programme.title: Family Bonds: New Beginings
